title: QUIC RFC 9000 PMTU Path-State Work Item
summary: Keep the RFC 9000 PMTU discovery slice traceable while the runtime grows explicit path-owned maximum datagram size state and active-path projection.
planned_changes:
- Add path-owned maximum-datagram-size state to the active, candidate, and recently validated path records.
- Carry that state through validation success and active-path promotion.
- Project the active path's maximum datagram size into the sender flow controller.
- Leave PMTU probe classification, probe-vs-ordinary send gating, and connection termination for follow-on packets.
verification_plan: Run the RFC 9000 requirement-home tests for the path-state slice and keep the proof scope honest while the remaining PMTU clauses stay deferred.
out_of_scope: PMTU probe generation and probe-vs-ordinary send gating.
Termination when no alternative path exists.
completion_notes: This packet currently proves only REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S14P2-0009. The remaining PMTU clauses stay deferred until the sender-side probe and gating work lands.
